summary: Classified the PR inventory shard independently using the hydrated cluster preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected, no close/merge/fix actions are recommended in plan mode, and validator-identified security-sensitive targets #89860, #89863, #89864, and #90885 are quarantined with route_security while unrelated PRs remain on their normal review paths.
